title: TechCorp Solutions v. Doe (2018)
summary: The court ruled that unlimited liability clauses in standard employment contracts are unconscionable and unenforceable under Section 23 of the Indian Contract Act.

title: State Bank v. Sharma Enterprises (2020)
summary: Held that immediate termination without notice in financial agreements violates natural justice unless a material, incurable breach has occurred.
keywords: termination, notice, financial, natural justice, breach

title: Global Tech v. Innovate Pvt Ltd (2021)
summary: Established that broad, perpetual non-compete clauses post-termination are void under Section 27 of the Indian Contract Act.

title: Rao v. Gupta (2015)
summary: Liquidated damages must represent a genuine pre-estimate of loss. Penalty clauses with exorbitant arbitrary amounts are not enforceable.
